M-057.NAME: mtproto-admin-analytics-api
M-057.path: backend/app/admin/router.py backend/app/mtproto/router.py backend/app/mtproto/analytics_service.py backend/app/mtproto/admin_alerts.py backend/app/mtproto/ip_observability.py backend/app/mtproto/promotion_tag.py backend/tests/test_mtproto_admin_analytics_api.py backend/tests/test_mtproto_ip_observability.py scripts/phase43-mtproto-admin-analytics-smoke.mjs docs/plans/Phase-42.xml docs/plans/Phase-43.xml
M-057.owns: Admin-only HTTP API for MTProto global analytics, per-proxy usage, event logs, abuse signals, top users, runtime health, availability proof, and promotion tag state.
M-057.purpose: Expose MTProto analytics to authenticated admins with strict redaction and filterable time windows.

exports.api-admin-mtproto-events: GET /api/v1/admin/mtproto/analytics/events with time, status, assignment, and event filters
exports.api-admin-mtproto-timeseries: Phase-43 graph buckets for traffic, active connections, errors, duration, and connection count.
exports.api-admin-mtproto-user-search: Phase-43 admin-only user/proxy search and user detail with issued_at, last_seen, sessions, current IP, last IP, and 90-day IP history.
exports.api-admin-mtproto-alerts: Phase-43 admin alert inbox and acknowledgement/resolution actions.
exports.api-admin-mtproto-promotion-tag: GET/PUT promotion tag state through M-059
exports.api-private-router-observations: POST /api/v1/mtproto/router-observations for token-protected RU SNI-router IP telemetry ingestion.

M-057.evidence: pass-local 2026-05-21: admin analytics API tests cover summary, timeseries, user search/detail, raw-IP investigation scope, router-observation ingestion, resource metrics, storage budget, alert actions, redaction guards, and non-admin rejection; Phase-43 static smoke passed.

api-policy.policy-1: Admin analytics returns masked SNI, safe ids, counts, status codes, and aggregate byte counters only.
api-policy.policy-2: Response payloads must fail closed if they contain full tg links, secrets, runtime tokens, or full promotion tags.
api-policy.policy-4: Raw IP addresses are allowed only in explicit Phase-43 admin-only investigation endpoints backed by M-061; general analytics and logs must not expose them.
api-policy.policy-5: Router observation ingestion is token-protected by the MTProto runtime token and accepts only metadata needed for encrypted M-061 storage.
api-policy.policy-3: Time filters must clamp large ranges and page event lists.

constraints.constraint-1: Analytics endpoints must not weaken existing MTProto admin reissue/revoke redaction.
constraints.constraint-2: All mutation endpoints require explicit confirmation and audit events.

M-057.hotspot: H-044: Admin analytics APIs must redact tags, runtime tokens, SNI secrets, full tg links, and high-risk identifiers
